text.p: So nice to hear from you. I got confused with the post graduate programme and abandoned it. The lecturers were too slow, and the it was quite uninteresting.
I am presently working as at Reporter with African Independent Television, AIT and Rapower FM station in .
I'm enjoying the job, but I still want to get my Masters Degree.
Meanwhile, it is still me and my husband- no kids yet. Please remember us in your prayers.
How are you and your family ?
Thanks for replying my mail. I am indeed very pleased. The last time I was in for my transcript , you office was locked for the 3 days I was there . Are you still in ?
I am currently residing at with my husband and undergoing a Masters programme in linguistics at University , ..

I hope to get a lecturing job when I am through. I will be in soon to search for materials for my project. I am proposing to work on "Idioms Comprehension in Non-native Speakers of Igbo Language". What do you think of it ? Is Dr. still in the department ?
